title: Useful Commands
description: Adds a a few useful commands for both server and clients. Currently has: /god /fly /speed /heal.
body:
# Useful Commands Mod:
## Commands
### /god [player]
  This command makes you invulnerable to every type of damage, including /kill.
### /fly [player]
  This command allows you to enable and disable flight in any gamemode.
  (It also disables flight for players already in creative mode.)
### /heal [player]
  This command restores health, hunger, and saturation completely.
### /speed [value] [player]
  This command changes the movement speed of any given player. The value can range from 1 to 10.


### Permissions:
This only works as either operator on a server or cheats enabled in singleplayer.
